## Problem statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## Scope

Which part of Arch-Engine does this affect?

- [ ] CLI (`arch-engine doctor`, `inspect`, `check`, etc.)
- [ ] Core runtime (topology extraction, graph construction)
- [ ] Adapters (workspace detection, signal enrichment)
- [ ] Governance packs (policy evaluation, boundary enforcement)
- [ ] Schema (type contracts, diagnostic output format)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Any other context, examples, or references.
